svg.title: Abyss OS compact reciprocal tree
svg.desc: A compact red-orange zig-zag map of Abyss OS showing Tree of Sophia, Agents of Abyss, AoA layers, ATM10-Agent, Dionysus, abyss-stack and 8Dionysus with reciprocal exchange arrows and no ownership collapse.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, sans-serif

g.text: compact reciprocal tree · reading order, not command hierarchy
